VESSEL_CREATION_INTRO=Are You... There?
Are We Connected?
{trigger soul_spawned Soul Spawned}
Excellent.
... Let Me Change that For You.
{trigger soul_glitch_pink Soul Glitch effect turn to pink}
Perfect.
Truly Perfect.
Now, we can begin.
Welcome, child.
You are about to create something wonderful.
A vessel. A being of pure potential.
Choose carefully, for each decision shapes what this vessel will become.

VESSEL_CREATION_LEG_CHOICE=First, we must choose the foundation.
What legs shall support this vessel?
Each choice carries its own weight, its own purpose.

VESSEL_CREATION_TORSO_CHOICE=Now, the core of the being.
What torso shall house the vessel's essence?
This will determine how the vessel moves through the world.

VESSEL_CREATION_HEAD_CHOICE=Finally, the seat of thought and perception.
What head shall crown this creation?
This choice will shape how the vessel sees and understands.

VESSEL_CREATION_NAME_PROMPT=Every vessel needs a name.
What shall you call this creation?
Speak carefully, for names have power.

VESSEL_CREATION_HONEST_QUESTION=Before we continue...
In creating this vessel, were you honest in your choices?
Did you choose with your heart, or with what you thought was expected?

VESSEL_CREATION_HONEST_RESPONSE=Good. Honesty is the foundation of all true creation.
Your vessel will be stronger for it.

VESSEL_CREATION_DISHONEST_RESPONSE=I see. Sometimes we hide our true desires, even from ourselves.
But there is no judgment here. Your vessel accepts all parts of you.

VESSEL_CREATION_FEELINGS_QUESTION=Tell me, child...
How do you feel about the nature of this world you've entered?
What does it mean to you to shape and be shaped by this experience?

VESSEL_CREATION_CREATOR_PROMPT=You have created something beautiful.
But every creation must know its creator.
What name do you claim as the one who brought this vessel into being?

VESSEL_CREATION_DISPLAY=Behold! Your vessel is complete.
Look upon what you have made.
Each choice, each decision, has led to this moment.

VESSEL_CREATION_DISCARD=...
But now, child, comes the hardest truth.
This vessel, this creation you have lovingly crafted...
It was never meant to last.
All vessels must be discarded. It is the way of things.

VESSEL_CREATION_FATE_ACCEPT=You understand. Some things are beautiful precisely because they are temporary.
Your vessel's purpose was in its creation, not its existence.

VESSEL_CREATION_FATE_SAVE=Your compassion honors you, but some fates cannot be changed.
The vessel thanks you for trying. That alone gives it meaning.

VESSEL_CREATION_FATE_QUESTION=Yes, question everything. Why must it be this way?
Some answers come only through experience, through loss, through understanding.

VESSEL_CREATION_FATE_DEFAULT=Your choice is noted. Even in the face of the inevitable, choice matters.

VESSEL_CREATION_TRANSITION=The vessel fades into memory, but its impact remains.
What was created can never truly be destroyed.
Now, your true journey begins...

CH11_MAGE_SISTERS_PROPHECY_DISCOVERY=[FRANCISCA left surprised]
Sisters... I have entdeckt something most troubling.
This "Deltarune" prophecy that these lightners speak of...
It bears an uncanny resemblance to our own sacred texts.
[FLAMBERGE left angry]
What?! You mean those "Angel's Heaven" tales?!
How dare they copy our religion!
[ZAN_PARTIZANNE left thoughtful]
Calm yourself, Flamberge.
Let us hear what Francisca has found.
[FRANCISCA left normal]
The prophecy speaks of three heroes...
A human, a monster, and a prince from the dark.
They shall seal the dark fountains and save the world.
[FLAMBERGE left shocked]
Three heroes... just like the three of us...
Chosen to resurrect our Dark Lord...
[ZAN_PARTIZANNE left concerned]
This cannot be mere coincidence.

CH11_SUSIE_HALTMANN_ANALYSIS=[susiehaltmann right normal]
I've been analyzing the data from both prophecies.
My father's company had extensive research on void energy.
[susiehaltmann right normal]
The mathematical signatures are identical.
The "Roaring" from Deltarune and the "Jamba Heart" from our dimension...
They share the same void frequency.
[KIRBY left surprised]
Wait, so they're connected?!
[susiehaltmann right normal]
More than connected.
They appear to be fragments of the same primordial force.

CH11_HYNESS_REVELATION=[HYNESS left distressed]
Jambandra... my beloved religion...
It cannot be... it simply cannot...
[FRANCISCA left concerned]
Lord Hyness? What troubles you so?
[HYNESS left ranting]
{shake}The texts! The ancient texts I entdeckt in the forbidden archives!{/shake}
They spoke of a time before Jambandra!
Before the prophecy was split into two!
[ZAN_PARTIZANNE left shocked]
Split? What do you mean, Lord Hyness?
[HYNESS left dramatic]
Long ago... eons before even the ancients walked these stars...
There was but ONE prophecy! ONE religion!
It was called...
{big}VOID ASTRAL BIRTH{/big}

CH11_VOID_ASTRAL_BIRTH_HISTORY=[HYNESS left normal]
Void Astral Birth was the original faith.
It worshipped the primordial void from whence all matter came.
The void that births stars... and destroys them.
[FLAMBERGE left confused]
But then... why are there two prophecies now?
[HYNESS left sad]
A schism. A terrible schism that tore the faith apart.
Some believed the void should be embraced... unleashed upon reality.
They became the Jambandra religion.
[HYNESS left dramatic]
Others believed the void must be sealed away forever.
They became what is now known as the Lightners of Deltarune.
Two sides of the same cosmic coin!

CH11_PROPHECIES_CLASH=[FRANCISCA left worried]
So for ages... both prophecies have been fighting each other?
Without even knowing they were once the same?
[HYNESS left distressed]
Precisely! The "Dark Fountains" of Deltarune...
They are the same as our "Jamba Hearts"!
Different names for the same void energy!
[FLAMBERGE left angry]
So when we tried to resurrect Void Termina...
We were doing the same thing as opening a Dark Fountain?!
[ZAN_PARTIZANNE left horrified]
And when they seal the fountains...
It's like sealing away our Dark Lord!
[HYNESS left upset]
The cosmic irony is... devastating.

CH11_HYNESS_CONFUSION=[HYNESS left distressed]
But what I cannot comprehend...
What makes no sense to me...
Is why this conflict CONTINUES!
[KIRBY left angry]
What do you mean, Hyness?
[HYNESS left ranting]
{shake}THE DARK LORD IS GONE!{/shake}
We defeated Void Termina! The threat was ended!
Kirby, you saved us all from that madness!
[HYNESS left upset]
So why... WHY do the prophecies still clash?!
Why are Dark Fountains still appearing?!
The original purpose of both religions is FULFILLED!
[MADELINE right distracted]
Maybe... the prophecies took on a life of their own?

CH11_MAGE_SISTERS_REALIZATION=[ZAN_PARTIZANNE left thoughtful]
Perhaps that is the tragedy of faith, Lord Hyness.
Once a belief takes root... it grows beyond its creators.
[FRANCISCA left sad]
The Jambastion believers and the Lightner believers...
Neither knows they were once brothers and sisters in faith.
They fight over interpretations of the same cosmic truth.
[FLAMBERGE left upset]
All those battles... all that hatred...
For NOTHING?! Because of some ancient disagreement?!
[HYNESS left broken]
I dedicated my LIFE to Jambandra...
I went MAD trying to fulfill the prophecy...
And now I learn it was all... a fragment...
A piece of something greater that was lost to time...

CH11_SUSIE_HALTMANN_CONCLUSION=[susiehaltmann right normal]
According to my calculations...
If the schism had never occurred...
The original Void Astral Birth prophecy would have been fulfilled peacefully.
[susiehaltmann right normal]
The void was never meant to be unleashed OR sealed.
It was meant to be... understood. Balanced.
[KIRBY left sad]
So everyone's been fighting the wrong battle all along...
[susiehaltmann right normal]
Essentially, yes.
Two halves of a whole, each convinced the other is wrong.
When in truth... they're both incomplete.

CH11_HYNESS_LAMENT=[HYNESS left crying]
I cannot... I simply cannot comprehend...
All those years in exile... all that suffering...
I was so certain the prophecy was RIGHT!
[HYNESS left distressed]
And now to learn that even our enemies...
The ones we called heretics and betrayers...
They were following the same truth we were!
Just... interpreted differently!
[ZAN_PARTIZANNE left comforting]

[HYNESS left broken]
But I SHOULD have known!
I was the officiant! The keeper of the faith!
And I was blind to its true origins!

CH11_PROPHECY_MOVING_FORWARD=[FRANCISCA left determined]

We help people find peace!

[HYNESS left grateful]

Perhaps... perhaps there is hope yet.
For all of us touched by the void.

CH12_UNTOLD_LEGEND_A=Chapter 0 the creations
when the heros emerged from the darkness
the heros created it own vessel
but however that hero was created was discarded and move to a women

CH12_UNTOLD_LEGEND_B=chapter 1 forbidden city
a women and part of her climb mountian celeste and entdeckt the hidden secrets within
after she fell asleep

CH12_UNTOLD_LEGEND_C=chapter 2 the awakening
after a long slumber, the woman awoke to find herself in a strange new world
one filled with monsters and magic
but that magic was darker than she expected
and ultimate capture by the apex predator
and the part of her escape from the nightmare temple

CH12_UNTOLD_LEGEND_D=chapter 3 calling for help
part of her called a star warrior to help
and that star warrior has anwser the called
climbing this mountain for the zuerst time

CH12_UNTOLD_LEGEND_E=chapter 4 unexpected allies
the star warrior has meet some unexpected allies along the way
a darkener that was trap in the mirror of the castle
thankfully the darkener was freed by the star warrior

CH12_UNTOLD_LEGEND_F=chapter 5 fractured
after a mid way through the mountain
they meet oshiro once again
but oshiro was concerned about what part of her is the only one here
and not madeline

CH12_UNTOLD_LEGEND_G=chapter 6 stronghold
a star warrior, part of her, and the darkener
climb this mountian
and enter a secret passage that leads to a stronghold of a lab
where you find a strawberry that turns out to be a trap
luckly they escape this time

and the goldenla
they enter the temple mirror
but however the temple is different
and eventually found and rescue madeline

CH13_UNDERGROUND_CINEMATIC=[RALSEI left normal]
That world back then was filled with very dangerous humans
who seek to capture and exploit monsters for their own gain.
eventaully monster were being over throwned and seal by this magic barrier
and that lead to the end of the war between humans and monsters
chara however did not like that idea
everytime he ask one of those humans to help him free those monsters
They always refuse him and called him a wimp
until one day he saw one of the lady that I think of and that suited man who knew that she has killed
was execucted...
he watch her die right in front of him
and that made him very angry to his actual parent
that then the suited man was very cruel and evil to everyone
his parent told him that suited man want to see him and ask him to join his army
chara however refuse him and ran away later that night
he went to the underground and hoping to find a way to break the barrier
and came across to asriel in the underground
asriel brought him back to dreemurr home and care for him
but chara still want to break the barrier
but it was worth it because dreemurr family and monsyter has care so much and do there best for him when he was young
however after months past by he became sick and weak
he ask asriel that rather merge his soul to him but to his soul merge to his own body
asriel however refuse him and said that it was too dangerous
chara encouraged asriel to do it anyway
and so asriel did it anyway
but however chara was able to past through the barrier
and confronting the suited man with incredible power
chara knew that he was no match for him
but him and asriel they knew that they would have to use one final act
they both combined save and true reset to overwrite the entire world
and that lead to the destruction of the entire reality
enventaully chara and asriel both perished in the process
and the world has been rewritten with a diffrent theme, diffrent, style, and diffrent people

CH13_ENTRYLOG_08=[none]
ENTRYLOG NUMBER 9
Determination exposure did not heal the damaged sample.
It locked the body into survival mode and kept the tissue moving after structural collapse.
Every heartbeat made the dark matter spread faster through the host.
[MADELINE left angry]
She wrote that like she was measuring weather.
[KIRBY right sad]
It sounds like they were suffering the whole time.

CH13_ENTRYLOG_09=[none]
ENTRYLOG NUMBER 10
The mass has begun copying nearby anatomy.
Eyes appear where the subject needs sight.
Teeth form along defensive tissue.
It is not evolving naturally.
It is improvising under fear.
[MADELINE left upset]
Improvising under fear...
that's not adaptation, that's panic.
[KIRBY right angry]
And she kept watching it happen.

CH13_ENTRYLOG_10=[none]
ENTRYLOG NUMBER 11
When startled, the specimens split into two patterns.
Closed chambers produce aggression, armor, and striking limbs.
Open exits produce flattening, softening, and liquid escape behavior.
Fight and flight are no longer instincts.
They are physical states.
[KIRBY right upset]
So even their fear changed their bodies.
[MADELINE left angry]
No one should have to survive like that.

CH13_ENTRYLOG_11=[none]
ENTRYLOG NUMBER 12
Several amalgamations still respond to familiar voices.
One repeated the same name for three hours.
Another retreated when I raised my voice.
I cannot keep pretending the mind is gone.
[MADELINE left sad]
They were still in there.
[KIRBY right angry]
Then she knew these weren't monsters.
They were victims.

CH13_ENTRYLOG_12=[none]
ENTRYLOG NUMBER 13
Subject clusters begin sharing distress signals.
When one panics, the others answer through the walls.
The entire chamber reacts as a single wounded organism.
I believe they feel each other.
[KIRBY right distracted]
They were all connected...
[MADELINE left angry]
That would make every experiment even crueler.

CH13_ENTRYLOG_13=[none]
ENTRYLOG NUMBER 14
Dark matter does not consume dead tissue zuerst.
It preserves living tissue and repurposes it.
Pain tolerance drops.
Awareness remains.
The body is remodeled faster when the subject is afraid.
[MADELINE left angry]
She knew fear made it worse and kept going.
[KIRBY right sad]
No wonder this whole lab feels wrong.

CH13_ENTRYLOG_14=[none]
ENTRYLOG NUMBER 15
Specimen 86 reacted to Kirby-related residue more aggressively than any other sample.
Not with recognition.
With hunger.
As if it remembered a missing shape and wanted to become it.
[KIRBY right surprised]
It was trying to copy me?
[MADELINE left distracted]

CH13_ENTRYLOG_15=[none]
ENTRYLOG NUMBER 16
One subject chose flight and forced itself through a ventilation grate.
It shed bone, skin, and voice in layers, then reassembled beyond the barrier.
I found pieces of it still trying to crawl back toward the others.
I euthanized what I could reach.
[MADELINE left upset]
That's horrible...
[KIRBY right angry]
It was trying to get back to the others.
She still called that containment.

CH13_ENTRYLOG_16=[none]
ENTRYLOG NUMBER 17
Determination and dark matter are a lethal pair.
One refuses to die.
The other refuses to stay one shape.
Together they create persistence without mercy.
Recovery is impossible once the cycle begins.
[KIRBY right angry]
Then every dose made them harder to save.
[MADELINE left determined]

CH13_ENTRYLOG_17=[none]
ENTRYLOG NUMBER 18
I caught one amalgamation staring at its reflection.
It touched the glass, then hid its face.
Another used a tendril to cover the eyes of the zuerst.
They are afraid of what they have become.
I am afraid of what I made.

CH13_ENTRYLOG_18=[none]

Specimen 86 has surpassed environmental limits.
It remained coherent beyond the event horizon threshold.
It no longer requires one host body.
It can infest, abandon, and reassemble across multiple vessels.
If it reaches open reality, containment will fail everywhere.
[KIRBY right angry]
That's not a specimen anymore.
That's a spreading disaster.
[MADELINE left determined]
And she wrote this before warning anyone.

CH16_ELS_STORY_INTRO=In the cracks between broken timelines,
the hatred of Zero did not disappear.
It fused with dark matter and discarded possibilities.
From that will, Els was born.

CH16_ELS_INTRO_MY_WORLD_NAME=ELS		My World

CH16_ELS_INTRO_MY_WORLD_STATUS=TIME: 9999:99:99	LEVEL: 99	HP: 9999/9999	ATK: 9999	DEF: 9999	GOLD: 99999999	EXP: 99999999

CH16_MADDY_FILE_ERASED_FATAL=File Corruptted... Fatal Error Detected

CH16_ELS_BOSS_INTRO_00=[zeroreal left normal]
You want to know what I am, Madeline?
Then listen carefully.
[zeroreal left normal]
I was not born the way you were.
I was pieced together from Zero's hatred,
dark matter, and the remains of possibilities that should have died.
[zeroreal left wut]
When those fragments found a will,
they stopped being a weapon.
That is how I became Zero.

CH16_ELS_BOSS_INTRO_01=[zeroreal left normal]
And then I saw you.
A girl who keeps creating new outcomes no matter how many times she falls.
An endless chain of possibilities.
[zeroreal left normal]
That is why I chose you.
With your potential, I will not stop at one world.
Not this mountain.
Not this universe.
[zeroreal left wut]
I will consume the entire Oversival multiverse
until every future belongs to me.

CH16_ELS_BOSS_INTRO_02=[zeroreal left normal]
But there was one obstacle between me and that future.
Your grandmother.
Granny.
[MADELINE left surprised]
Granny...?
What did you do?
[zeroreal left normal]
I could not break her spirit,
so I chose something slower.
I pushed age into her bones.
I made her weaker, day by day,
hoping time itself would kill her for me.
[MADELINE left angry]
You hurt Granny just to reach me?!
[BADELINE left yell]
Madeline, focus!
[zeroreal left wut]
Yes.
Now show me whether those endless possibilities of yours
can stop what Zero has become.

you struggle against the overwhelming power of Asriel Zero, but your determination and love for your friends and family keep you going.
yet you refuse to give up, even as your soul is lifted out of your body and into the afterlife.
Asriel Zero's power is immense, but your will to live and protect those you care about is stronger.
How will you overcome this seemingly insurmountable obstacle and save your friends and family from oblivion?
{trigger 5 save point ui apears}
[]
no that wouldn't work,
theres has to be a way to save everyone, and stop Asriel Zero from taking you all away, but how?
...

I reach out to the abyss and call someone else for help.
So I Call out for help one last time...

CH20_ASRIEL_ZERO_VOID_ANSWERS=[]
the Void is with you this time, and it has heard your call for help.
Asriel's soul is still within him... somewhere... buried beneath all that darkness.
... Within the Void, you can feel a presence... a familiar one... a comforting one...
Something is shaking you out of the abyss...

CH20_ASRIEL_ZERO_VOID_GUIDANCE=[]
The Void speaks without words.
It shows you the truth: the souls of everyone Asriel absorbed are still alive inside him.
Lost. Afraid. Forgotten.
But not gone.
If you can reach them... if you can remind them who they are...
... you can save them all.
... and maybe, just maybe, save Asriel too.

You must reach out to each of them.
Remind them of who they were.
Remind them that they are {~}LOVED{/~}.
Only then can they break free from his grasp.

{0.4}When she was young, the anxiety started creeping in...
{0.8}like a shadow that followed her everywhere she went.
{0.5}It whispered terrible things to her... told her she wasn't good enough...
{0.4}told her she'd never amount to anything.
[GRANNY right creepa]
{0.6}And then the depression came...
{0.4}It was like a heavy blanket that smothered everything bright in her life.
{0.8}Some days she couldn't even get out of bed.
{0.5}Some days she didn't want to.
{0.4}She felt like the whole world was against her...
{0.6}like she was drowning and nobody could see her struggling.
[KIRBY right sadder]
I... I had no idea it was that bad...
[GRANNY right creepa]
{0.5}It was worse than bad, dear.
{0.4}She had panic attacks that left her gasping for air in the middle of the night.
{0.6}She lost friends because she was too scared to leave her apartment.
{0.8}She pushed away everyone who tried to help because she thought she was a burden.
{0.5}Her self-doubt was so crippling that she almost gave up on everything...
{0.4}on her dreams, on her relationships, on {~}herself{/~}.
[GRANNY right creepa]
{0.6}And the worst part? She smiled through all of it.
{0.4}She hid her pain behind jokes and forced laughter...
{0.8}because she didn't want anyone else to feel responsible for her suffering.
{0.5}That girl carried the weight of the world on her shoulders...
{0.4}and never once asked for help until it nearly destroyed her.
[GRANNY right normal]
{0.8}But Kirby... here's the part that matters most.
{0.5}Madeline didn't just survive all of that...
{0.4}she {*}overcame{/*} it.
[GRANNY right creepa]
{0.6}She climbed that mountain even when every fiber of her being screamed at her to turn back.
{0.4}She faced {+BADELINE}... the living embodiment of all her fears and insecurities...
{0.8}and instead of destroying her, she {~}embraced{/~} her.
{0.5}She accepted that the darkness inside her wasn't something to be defeated...
{0.4}it was something to be {~}understood{/~}.
[GRANNY right normal]

{0.4}Madeline didn't just get better.
{0.8}She became a {*}better woman{/*} than she ever was before.
{0.5}Stronger. Kinder. More compassionate.
{0.4}She learned that asking for help isn't weakness... it's {~}courage{/~}.
{0.6}She learned that falling down doesn't define you... {~}getting back up{/~} does.

[ASRIEL left sad]
{0.6}Granny... I have a question.

WAVEFAZE_PAGE_TITLE=Wave Faze Presentation

WAVEFAZE_DESKTOP_MYPC=My New Mountain

WAVEFAZE_DESKTOP_POWERPOINT=wavefaze.ppt

WAVEFAZE_DESKTOP_RECYCLEBIN=Recycle Bin

WAVEFAZE_DESKTOP_UNDERNET=Under Net

WAVEFAZE_DESKTOP_GAMEMAKER=Game Maker Studio 2

WAVEFAZE_DESKTOP_KIRBY=Kirby	     Enmulator

WAVEFAZE_DESKTOP_STARTBUTTON=TobyOS

WAVEFAZE_PAGE1_TITLE=Wavefazing and You

WAVEFAZE_PAGE1_SUBTITLE=A practical and complex solution for catching a fastest bird in deep space

WAVEFAZE_PAGE2_TITLE=Can't|Catch|That|God|Damn|Bird?!

WAVEFAZE_PAGE2_LIST=-Fact: Birds are hard to catch
-Wow. It's fast!
-Also, it can fly
-It Can Also go though Narrow Gap
-And {+CHARA} won't help
-(he is the worst)

WAVEFAZE_PAGE2_IMPOSSIBLE=AM I Stupid???!

WAVEFAZE_PAGE3_TITLE=Introducing... Wavefazing!!!:3

WAVEFAZE_PAGE3_INFO=With Wavefazing, you can jump very far
regain your dash
and phase through with non dream block{~} back all in One!{/~}
-How?

WAVEFAZE_PAGE3_EASY=How? It's "easy!"

WAVEFAZE_PAGE4_TITLE=Here How It's Done

WAVEFAZE_PAGE4_LIST=-Jump
-Dash diagonally down to the ground
-Immediately jump again and hold forward
-Shortly after use your dash faze to go through to those wall
-{~}You did it!{/~}
-(go you)

WAVEFAZE_PAGE5_TITLE=Having Issue?

WAVEFAZE_PAGE5_INFO1={#ff0000}If you dash too late{#}
you would {~}fall{/~} before you can dash again.

WAVEFAZE_PAGE5_INFO2={#ff0000}If you faze dash right front of those sharp object{#}
you would get {~}eliminated{/~}!

WAVEFAZE_PAGE6_TITLE=Happy Toby Fox Day!

WAVEFAZESLAMMER_PAGE0_TITLE=The WaveFazeSlammer

WAVEFAZESLAMMER_PAGE0_SUBTITLE=Master the ultimate advanced technique: Wavedash + DreamDash + WallJump + GroundPound

WAVEFAZESLAMMER_PAGE1_TITLE=What is WaveFazeSlammer?

WAVEFAZESLAMMER_PAGE1_INFO=The WaveFazeSlammer is an {#ffaa00}extremely advanced technique{#}
that combines {~}FOUR{/~} different movement abilities:
-{#00ff00}Wavedash{#} to gain horizontal momentum
-{#00ffff}Dream Dash{#} to phase through dream blocks
-{#ffff00}Wall Jump{#} to change direction mid-air
-{#ff00ff}Ground Pound Dash{#} to slam down with force
This technique requires {~}precise timing{/~} and
understanding of all the basic movement mechanics.
Master this, and {~}no obstacle{/~} can stop you!

WAVEFAZESLAMMER_PAGE2_TITLE=Step-by-Step Execution

WAVEFAZESLAMMER_PAGE2_STEPS={#00ff00}Step 1:{#} Perform a wavedash by dashing
diagonally down and jumping immediately
{#00ffff}Step 2:{#} While airborne, use dream dash
to phase through a dream block
{#ffff00}Step 3:{#} Wall jump off a nearby wall
to redirect your momentum
{#ff00ff}Step 4:{#} Dash diagonally down to perform
a ground pound slam for maximum impact
Perfect execution requires {~}rhythm and flow{/~}!

WAVEFAZESLAMMER_PAGE3_TITLE=Common Mistakes vs Correct Execution

WAVEFAZESLAMMER_PAGE3_MISTAKE_TITLE={#ff0000}Common Mistakes:{#}

WAVEFAZESLAMMER_PAGE3_MISTAKE_INFO={#ff0000}X{#} Dashing {~}too late{/~} after the initial jump
   {#666666}? You'll lose momentum and fall{#}
{#ff0000}X{#} Missing the {~}dream block timing{/~}
   {#666666}? You'll bonk into the wall{#}
{#ff0000}X{#} Forgetting to {~}wall jump{/~} after dream dash
   {#666666}? You won't have the angle for ground pound{#}
{#ff0000}X{#} Ground pounding {~}too early{/~}
   {#666666}? You'll miss your target{#}

WAVEFAZESLAMMER_PAGE3_SUCCESS_TITLE={#00ff00}Correct Execution:{#}

WAVEFAZESLAMMER_PAGE3_SUCCESS_INFO={#00ff00}?{#} Wavedash with {~}perfect jump timing{/~}
   {#666666}? Maintain full horizontal speed{#}
{#00ff00}?{#} Dream dash {~}immediately{/~} when airborne
   {#666666}? Phase through smoothly{#}
{#00ff00}?{#} Wall jump {~}as soon as you exit{/~} the block
   {#666666}? Redirect momentum upward{#}
{#00ff00}?{#} Ground pound at the {~}peak{/~} of your arc
   {#666666}? Maximum downward force!{#}
Practice makes perfect! {~}Keep trying!{/~}

WAVEFAZESLAMMER_PAGE4_TITLE=Why WaveFazeSlammer Matters

WAVEFAZESLAMMER_PAGE4_INTRO=You might be wondering...
{~}"Why go through all this trouble?"{/~}
Here's the truth:

WAVEFAZESLAMMER_PAGE4_FACTS={#ff0000}FACT:{#} Regular dashes deal {~}50 damage{/~}
   {#666666}? Not enough to break tough obstacles!{#}
{#ff0000}FACT:{#} Mini-bosses have {~}200+ HP{/~}
   {#666666}? It would take 4+ hits to defeat them!{#}
{#ff0000}FACT:{#} Main bosses have {~}500-1000+ HP{/~}
   {#666666}? Normal attacks barely scratch them!{#}
{#ff0000}FACT:{#} Even {~}Badeline's dash{/~} only does {~}75 damage{/~}
   {#666666}? Still not powerful enough!{#}
{#ff0000}FACT:{#} {~}Chara's booster{/~} deals {~}80 damage{/~}
   {#666666}? Close, but still insufficient!{#}
{#ff0000}FACT:{#} {~}Ralsei's booster{/~} heals instead of damages
   {#666666}? Vervollständigely useless for offense!{#}

WAVEFAZESLAMMER_PAGE4_SOLUTION={#00ff00}THE SOLUTION:{#}
The WaveFazeSlammer combines {~}ALL momentum types{/~}:
-Wavedash speed ({~}+50 force{/~})
-Dream dash phase ({~}+75 force{/~})
-Wall jump redirect ({~}+60 force{/~})
-Ground pound impact ({~}+150 force{/~})
{#ffaa00}TOTAL: 335 DAMAGE!{#}
This is enough to {~}one-shot mini-bosses{/~}
and deal {~}significant damage{/~} to main bosses!
Without this technique, you'll be stuck
chipping away at enemies for {~}ages{/~}...
or worse, {~}you won't survive{/~} the encounter.
{#00ff00}Master this, and become unstoppable!{#}

WAVEFAZESLAMMER_PAGE4_BONUS={#ff00ff}BONUS TIP:{#} {~}Copy Abilities{/~}
Combining {~}Copy Abilities{/~} with WaveFazeSlammer
creates {~}DEVASTATING{/~} combo attacks!
{#ffaa00}Fire Copy{#} + WaveFazeSlammer
   {#666666}? 335 + 120 = {#ff0000}455 DAMAGE!{#}{#666666}{#}
{#ffaa00}Sword Copy{#} + WaveFazeSlammer
   {#666666}? 335 + 150 = {#ff0000}485 DAMAGE!{#}{#666666}{#}
{#ffaa00}Hammer Copy{#} + WaveFazeSlammer
   {#666666}? 335 + 180 = {#ff0000}515 DAMAGE!{#}{#666666}{#}
{#ffaa00}Beam Copy{#} + WaveFazeSlammer
   {#666666}? 335 + 140 = {#ff0000}475 DAMAGE!{#}{#666666}{#}
{#ffaa00}Ice Copy{#} + WaveFazeSlammer
   {#666666}? 335 + 130 + {~}Freeze{/~} = {#ff0000}465 DAMAGE + STUN!{#}{#666666}{#}
With the right Copy Ability, you can take down
{~}ANY{/~} boss in just {~}2-3 hits{/~}!
The WaveFazeSlammer is your {~}foundation{/~},
Copy Abilities are your {~}amplifier{/~}!
